code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(byte)
      byte
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b - 32)}"
    else
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end
